avoid: never name a real person (roles only)
never put words in a family member's mouth
visual: no family members/children in frame
positioning: Empower your fitness journey with clear, informative guidance.
angles_to_pursue: Highlight the benefits of different fitness equipment and how to use them effectively.
Provide clear pricing information and subscription details to address customer pain points.
Share tips and advice on how to incorporate fitness into a busy lifestyle.
Discuss the importance of variety in fitness routines and offer suggestions for diverse workout plans.
Explore local fitness trends and how they can be adapted for personal use.
research_requests: Identify key motivators for fitness enthusiasts in the region to tailor content accordingly.
Analyze competitor strategies, particularly from fitnessfirstme, to differentiate our brand.
Investigate local fitness events or trends that can be leveraged for content creation.
